title: We Discovered A New Fire Creature
description:
We just discovered a new creature… the FIRE AMOEBA. 

It can live at hotter temperatures than any other animal as complex as it.

And it’s changing how we understand the conditions for life on earth and beyond…

HUGE if true! For more optimistic science and tech stories, subscribe.

To read more: DOI: 10.1101/2025.11.24.690213

#shorts #science #animal #hot #microscope
